cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. The question is asking which of the two statements is sarcastic. The options are: (A) Good thing you can boil impurities out of water (B) Good thing you can boil Uranium out of water First, I need to understand what sarcasm means in this context. Sarcasm is usually a form of irony where someone says the opposite of what they really mean, often with a mocking or scornful tone. So, the key is to identify which of these
